subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of that jewel of being and joy of them that bow down in adoration, in truth adversities, trials and calamities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن جواهر وجود و سروران اهل سجود فی الحقیقه شدائد و مصائب و رزایاء
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude, @soul; spirit after death
